name: 10Y Treasury Yield
interpretation: Long rates remain restrictive but below prior stress levels, supporting duration if growth cools.

name: Core PCE Inflation
interpretation: Inflation is moderating but still above target, preserving policy optionality.

name: Unemployment Rate
interpretation: Labor conditions are cooling without yet confirming a recessionary break.

name: Real GDP Growth
interpretation: Growth is slower but positive, consistent with a soft-landing base case.

name: Retail Sales
interpretation: Consumer demand is resilient but losing momentum.

name: Global PMI Composite
interpretation: Global activity remains near stall speed rather than broad contraction.

name: Implied Policy Path
value: Higher odds of cuts over 12 months
interpretation: Market pricing anticipates easier policy as inflation cools.

name: Global Growth Estimate
interpretation: International demand is subdued, reducing overheating risk but capping cyclicality.

name: Financial Conditions
interpretation: Conditions are restrictive enough to slow growth but not yet crisis-like.

name: S&P 500 Earnings Revisions
interpretation: Equity earnings expectations are not yet signaling broad recession.

name: 10-K Risk Factor Tone
interpretation: Corporate filings continue to flag rates, refinancing, and demand uncertainty.
